mission_area.operator_summary: Katoomba, NSW AOI covers about 74.0 km² across 9.5 by 7.8 km at roughly 500 m cells.

grid_summary.operator_summary: The selected area maps to a 19 by 16 planning grid.

terrain_summary.operator_summary: The selected area is mostly hill country, with elevated slope burden and good trail access.

search_pattern_summary: Divides the search box into independent sectors for parallel coverage and easier monitoring.
search_pattern_reason: Several drones can cover ground in parallel here, so dividing the area into sectors makes the mission easier to monitor while reducing redundant overlap. Katoomba, NSW spans about 9.5 by 7.8 km with mostly hill country. Staging sits about 4.9 km from the area centre.
search_pattern_fit_summary: Best when several drones can search in parallel without crowding each other. Current spacing is built around an effective swath of about 5.4 cells. Hill Country is the dominant ground type.
